<ENVELOPE>
	<HEADER>
		<VERSION>1</VERSION>
		<TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
		<TYPE>Data</TYPE>
		<ID>VOUCHER</ID>
	</HEADER>
	<BODY>
		<DESC>
			<STATICVARIABLES>
				<EXPORTFLAG>YES</EXPORTFLAG>
				<SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
				<SVCURRENTCOMPANY>Delhi-Lucid</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
			</STATICVARIABLES>
			<TDL>
				<TDLMESSAGE>
					<REPORT NAME="CP_Voucher" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
                        <USE>VOUCHER</USE>
                        <USE>Printed Invoice</USE>
                        <FORMS>VOUCHER</FORMS>
                        <OBJECTS>Voucher : $$Sprintf:@@VchMasterid:303</OBJECTS>
                        <SET>VARVchDate : "20250801"</SET>
                        <SET>vResetOverriddenFlags : Yes</SET>
                        <SET>vResetIgnoreGSTIN  : Yes</SET>
                        <SET>SVVoucherType  : Sales Order</SET>
                    </REPORT>
				</TDLMESSAGE>
			</TDL>
		</DESC>
	</BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
 	<HEADER>

 	</HEADER>
<BODY>
<DESC>

<COLLECTION NAME="ITCVoucherCollTest" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">

  <NATIVEMETHOD>MASTERID, VOUCHERTYPENAME, VOUCHERNUMBER, PARTYLEDGERNAME, ISOPTIONAL, AMOUNT</NATIVEMETHOD>
  </COLLECTION>
  </TDLMESSAGE>
  </TDL>
</DESC>
</BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
<HEADER>
<VERSION>1</VERSION>
<TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
<TYPE>Data</TYPE>
<ID>ODBC Report</ID>
</HEADER>
<BODY>
<DESC>
<TDL>  
<TDLMESSAGE>
<COLLECTION NAME="CP_Stockitem Coll">
                        <TYPE>STOCKITEM</TYPE>
                        <FILTERS>CP_RemvEmptyUOM</FILTERS>
                    </COLLECTION>
                    <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="CP_RemvEmptyUOM">NOT $$IsSysName:$BASEUNITS</SYSTEM>
                    </TDLMESSAGE>
</TDL>
<SQLREQUEST TYPE="Prepare" METHOD="SQLPrepare">SELECT $MASTERID AS MASTERID, $NAME AS NAME, $PARTNO AS PARTNO, $BASEUNITS AS BASEUNITS, $GSTHSNCode AS HSNCODE, $GSTIGSTRate AS IGST, $StandardPrice AS STDPRICE, $LastSalePrice AS LASTPRICE, $$FromValue:"":$$ToValue:##VARVchDate:$$Number:$CLOSINGBALANCE AS CLOSINGSTOCK,  $IsBatchWiseOn AS ISBATCHWISEON, $HasMfgDate AS HASMFGDATE, $IsPerishableOn AS HASEXPDATE from CP_StockitemColl</SQLREQUEST>
<STATICVARIABLES>
<EXPLODEFLAG>Yes</EXPLODEFLAG>
<SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
<SVCURRENTCOMPANY>${escapedCompany}</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
</STATICVARIABLES>
</DESC>
</BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
	<HEADER>
		<VERSION>1</VERSION>
		<TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
		<TYPE>Data</TYPE>
		<ID>CP_LedGroup</ID>
	</HEADER>
	<BODY>
		<DESC>
			<STATICVARIABLES>
				<EXPORTFLAG>YES</EXPORTFLAG>
				<SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
                <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>${escapedCompany}</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
			</STATICVARIABLES>
			<TDL>
				<TDLMESSAGE>
					<REPORT NAME="CP_LedGroup">
						<FORMS>CP_LedGroup</FORMS>
					</REPORT>
					<FORM NAME="CP_LedGroup">
						<TOPPARTS>CP_LedGroup</TOPPARTS>
					</FORM>
					<PART NAME="CP_LedGroup">
						<TOPLINES>CP_LedGroup</TOPLINES>
						<REPEAT>CP_LedGroup : CP_LedGroup Coll</REPEAT>
						<SCROLLED>Vertical</SCROLLED>
					</PART>
					<LINE NAME="CP_LedGroup">
						<LEFTFIELDS>CP_Temp1, CP_Temp2</LEFTFIELDS>
						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp1  : Set as : $NAME</LOCAL>
						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp2  : Set as : $MASTERID</LOCAL>

						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp1  : Xml Tag : "NAME"</LOCAL>
						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp2  : Xml Tag : "MASTERID"</LOCAL>

                        <XMLTAG>"groups"</XMLTAG>
					</LINE>
					<FIELD NAME="CP_Temp1">   </FIELD>
					<FIELD NAME="CP_Temp2">   </FIELD>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP_LedGroup Coll">
						<COLLECTIONS>CP_LedGroup DrsColl, CP_LedGroup CrsColl, CP_LedGroup BrnchColl</COLLECTIONS>
						<SORT>Default : $NAME</SORT>
					</COLLECTION>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP_LedGroup DrsColl" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<TYPE>GROUP</TYPE>
						<CHILDOF>$$GroupSundryDebtors</CHILDOF>
						<BELONGSTO>Yes</BELONGSTO>
					</COLLECTION>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP_LedGroup CrsColl" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<TYPE>GROUP</TYPE>
						<CHILDOF>$$GroupSundryCreditors</CHILDOF>
						<BELONGSTO>Yes</BELONGSTO>
					</COLLECTION>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP_LedGroup BrnchColl" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<TYPE>GROUP</TYPE>
						<CHILDOF>$$GroupBranches</CHILDOF>
						<BELONGSTO>Yes</BELONGSTO>
					</COLLECTION>
				</TDLMESSAGE>
			</TDL>
		</DESC>
	</BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
	<HEADER>
		<VERSION>1</VERSION>
		<TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
		<TYPE>Data</TYPE>
		<ID>CP_GodownClsStck</ID>
	</HEADER>
	<BODY>
		<DESC>
			<STATICVARIABLES>
				<EXPORTFLAG>YES</EXPORTFLAG>
				<SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
                <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>${escapedCompany}</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
			</STATICVARIABLES>
			<TDL>
				<TDLMESSAGE>
					<REPORT NAME="CP_GodownClsStck">
						<FORMS>CP_GodownClsStck</FORMS>
					</REPORT>
					<FORM NAME="CP_GodownClsStck">
						<TOPPARTS>CP_GodownClsStck</TOPPARTS>
					</FORM>
					<PART NAME="CP_GodownClsStck">
						<TOPLINES>CP_GodownClsStck</TOPLINES>
						<REPEAT>CP_GodownClsStck : CP_GodownClsStck Coll</REPEAT>
						<SCROLLED>Vertical</SCROLLED>
					</PART>
					<LINE NAME="CP_GodownClsStck">
						<LEFTFIELDS>CP_Temp1, CP_Temp2</LEFTFIELDS>
						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp1  : Set as : $NAME</LOCAL>
						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp2  : Set as : $$ToValue:"01-Sep-25":$$Number:$$GodownItemValue:$NAME:"Item C":$ClosingBalance</LOCAL>

						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp1  : Xml Tag : "NAME"</LOCAL>
						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp2  : Xml Tag : "CLOSINGSTOCK"</LOCAL>

                        <XMLTAG>"godown"</XMLTAG>
					</LINE>
					<FIELD NAME="CP_Temp1">   </FIELD>
					<FIELD NAME="CP_Temp2">   </FIELD>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP_GodownClsStck Coll" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<TYPE>GODOWN</TYPE>
					</COLLECTION>
				</TDLMESSAGE>
			</TDL>
		</DESC>
	</BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
	<HEADER>
		<VERSION>1</VERSION>
		<TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
		<TYPE>Data</TYPE>
		<ID>CP_CompanyClsStck</ID>
	</HEADER>
	<BODY>
		<DESC>
			<STATICVARIABLES>
				<EXPORTFLAG>YES</EXPORTFLAG>
				<SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
			</STATICVARIABLES>
			<TDL>
				<TDLMESSAGE>
					<REPORT NAME="CP_CompanyClsStck">
						<FORMS>CP_CompanyClsStck</FORMS>
					</REPORT>
					<FORM NAME="CP_CompanyClsStck">
						<TOPPARTS>CP_CompanyClsStck</TOPPARTS>
					</FORM>
					<PART NAME="CP_CompanyClsStck">
						<TOPLINES>CP_CompanyClsStck</TOPLINES>
						<REPEAT>CP_CompanyClsStck : CP_CompanyClsStck Coll</REPEAT>
						<SCROLLED>Vertical</SCROLLED>
					</PART>
					<LINE NAME="CP_CompanyClsStck">
						<LEFTFIELDS>CP_Temp1, CP_Temp2</LEFTFIELDS>
						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp1  : Set as : $NAME</LOCAL>
						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp2  : Set as : $$CompanyValue:$NAME:$$ToValue:"01-Sep-25":$$Number:$ClosingBalance:STOCKITEM:"Item C"</LOCAL>

						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp1  : Xml Tag : "NAME"</LOCAL>
						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp2  : Xml Tag : "CLOSINGSTOCK"</LOCAL>

                        <XMLTAG>"companystck"</XMLTAG>
					</LINE>
					<FIELD NAME="CP_Temp1">   </FIELD>
					<FIELD NAME="CP_Temp2">   </FIELD>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP_CompanyClsStck Coll" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<TYPE>COMPANY</TYPE>
                        <FILTERS>CP_RequCompany</FILTERS>
					</COLLECTION>
                    <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="CP_RequCompany">$NAME = "Delhi - Lucid"</SYSTEM>
				</TDLMESSAGE>
			</TDL>
		</DESC>
	</BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
	<HEADER>
		<VERSION>1</VERSION>
		<TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
		<TYPE>Data</TYPE>
		<ID>CP_CompanyID</ID>
	</HEADER>
	<BODY>
		<DESC>
			<STATICVARIABLES>
				<EXPORTFLAG>YES</EXPORTFLAG>
				<SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
			</STATICVARIABLES>
			<TDL>
				<TDLMESSAGE>
					<REPORT NAME="CP_CompanyClsStck">
						<FORMS>CP_CompanyClsStck</FORMS>
					</REPORT>
					<FORM NAME="CP_CompanyClsStck">
						<TOPPARTS>CP_CompanyClsStck</TOPPARTS>
					</FORM>
					<PART NAME="CP_CompanyClsStck">
						<TOPLINES>CP_CompanyClsStck</TOPLINES>
						<REPEAT>CP_CompanyClsStck : CP_CompanyClsStck Coll</REPEAT>
						<SCROLLED>Vertical</SCROLLED>
					</PART>
					<LINE NAME="CP_CompanyClsStck">
						<LEFTFIELDS>CP_Temp1, CP_Temp2</LEFTFIELDS>
						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp1  : Set as : $NAME</LOCAL>
						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp2  : Set as : $$CompanyValue:$NAME:$$ToValue:"01-Sep-25":$$Number:$ClosingBalance:STOCKITEM:"Item C"</LOCAL>

						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp1  : Xml Tag : "NAME"</LOCAL>
						<LOCAL>Field : CP_Temp2  : Xml Tag : "CLOSINGSTOCK"</LOCAL>

                        <XMLTAG>"companystck"</XMLTAG>
					</LINE>
					<FIELD NAME="CP_Temp1">   </FIELD>
					<FIELD NAME="CP_Temp2">   </FIELD>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP_CompanyClsStck Coll" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<TYPE>COMPANY</TYPE>
                        <FILTERS>CP_RequCompany</FILTERS>
					</COLLECTION>
                    <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="CP_RequCompany">$NAME = "Delhi - Lucid"</SYSTEM>
				</TDLMESSAGE>
			</TDL>
		</DESC>
	</BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
	<HEADER>
		<VERSION>1</VERSION>
		<TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
		<TYPE>Data</TYPE>
		<ID>ODBC Report</ID>
	</HEADER>
	<BODY>
		<DESC>
			<STATICVARIABLES>
				<EXPORTFLAG>YES</EXPORTFLAG>
				<SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
				<SVCURRENTCOMPANY>${escapedCompany}</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
			</STATICVARIABLES>
			<TDL>
				<TDLMESSAGE>
					<REPORT NAME="ODBC Report" ISMODIFY="Yes" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<Add>Variable : SVFromDate, SVToDate</Add>
						<Set>SVFromdate : "01-Sep-25"</Set>
						<Set>SVTodate : "01-Sep-25"</Set>
					</REPORT>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP_VoucherData Coll" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<SourceCollection>CP_VoucherData SColl, CP_VoucherData SRColl</SourceCollection>
						<Walk>ALLINVENTORYENTRIES</Walk>
						<NativeMethod>STOCKITEMNAME</NativeMethod>
						<Method>CP_MasterID : $..MASTERID</Method>
						<Method>CP_VchType : $..VOUCHERTYPENAME</Method>
						<Method>CP_isSales : $$IsSales:$..VOUCHERTYPENAME</Method>
						<Method>CP_Date  : $..DATE</Method>
						<Method>CP_VchNo  : $..VoucherNumber</Method>
						<Method>CP_Customer : $..PARTYLEDGERNAME</Method>
						<Method>CP_CGroup  : $..CP_LedGroup</Method>
						<Method>CP_CGrpofGrp : $PARENT:GROUP:$..CP_LedGroup</Method>
						<Method>CP_State  : $..STATENAME</Method>
						<Method>CP_Country : $..COUNTRYOFRESIDENCE</Method>
						<Method>CP_GstNo  : $..PARTYGSTIN</Method>
						<Method>CP_Pincode : $..PARTYPINCODE</Method>
						<Method>CP_InvVale : $..CP_InvValue</Method>
						<Method>CP_CostCenter : $..COSTCENTRENAME</Method>
						<Method>CP_Stockitem : $STOCKITEMNAME</Method>
						<Method>CP_SGroup  : $PARENT:STOCKITEM:$STOCKITEMNAME</Method>
						<Method>CP_SGrpofGrp : $PARENT:STOCKGROUP:$PARENT:STOCKITEM:$STOCKITEMNAME</Method>
						<Method>CP_SCategory : $CATEGORY:STOCKITEM:$STOCKITEMNAME</Method>
						<Method>CP_SCatgofCat : $PARENT:STOCKCATEGORY:$CATEGORY:STOCKITEM:$STOCKITEMNAME</Method>
						<Method>CP_UOM  : $BASEUNITS:STOCKITEM:$STOCKITEMNAME</Method>
						<Method>CP_BILLEDQTY : IF $$IsSales:$..VOUCHERTYPENAME THEN $$Number:$BILLEDQTY ELSE $$Number:$BILLEDQTY * -1</Method>
						<Method>CP_Rate  : $$Number:$RATE</Method>
						<Method>CP_AMOUNT  : IF $$IsSales:$..VOUCHERTYPENAME THEN $$Number:$AMOUNT ELSE $$Number:$AMOUNT * -1</Method>
						<Filters>CP_isReqStckGroup, CP_isReqStckCatg</Filters>
					</COLLECTION>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP_VoucherData SColl" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<Type>VOUCHERS : VOUCHERTYPE</Type>
						<ChildOf>$$VchTypeSales</ChildOf>
						<BelongsTo>Yes</BelongsTo>
						<Filters>NotIsOptionalOrCancel</Filters>
						<NativeMethod>*, AMOUNT</NativeMethod>
						<Method>CP_InvValue : $$Number:$AMOUNT</Method>
						<Method>CP_LedGroup : $PARENT:LEDGER:$PARTYLEDGERNAME</Method>
						<Filters>CP_isReqGroup, CP_isSameMailid</Filters>
					</COLLECTION>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP_VoucherData SRColl" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<Type>VOUCHERS : VOUCHERTYPE</Type>
						<ChildOf>$$VchTypeCreditNote</ChildOf>
						<BelongsTo>Yes</BelongsTo>
						<Filters>NotIsOptionalOrCancel</Filters>
						<NativeMethod>*, AMOUNT</NativeMethod>
						<Method>CP_InvValue : $$Number:$AMOUNT * -1</Method>
						<Method>CP_LedGroup : $PARENT:LEDGER:$PARTYLEDGERNAME</Method>
						<Filters>CP_isReqGroup, CP_isSameMailid</Filters>
					</COLLECTION>
					<SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="CP_isReqGroup" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINTERNAL="No">$$IsLedOfGrp:$PARTYLEDGERNAME:"Sundry Debtors"   </SYSTEM>
					<SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="CP_isSameMailid" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINTERNAL="No">$EMAIL:LEDGER:$PARTYLEDGERNAME Contains "rohit@itcatalystindia.com" OR $EMAILCC:LEDGER:$PARTYLEDGERNAME Contains "rohit@itcatalystindia.com"   </SYSTEM>
					<SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="CP_isReqStckGroup" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINTERNAL="No">$$IsObjectBelongsTo:STOCKGROUP:($PARENT:STOCKITEM:$STOCKITEMNAME):"Group A"   </SYSTEM>
					<SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="CP_isReqStckCatg" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINTERNAL="No">$$IsObjectBelongsTo:STOCKCATEGORY:($CATEGORY:STOCKITEM:$STOCKITEMNAME):"Categroy 1"   </SYSTEM>
				</TDLMESSAGE>
			</TDL>
			<SQLREQUEST TYPE="Prepare" METHOD="SQLPrepare">Select $CP_MasterID, $CP_VchType, $CP_isSales, $CP_Date, $CP_VchNo, $CP_Customer, $CP_CGroup, $CP_CGrpofGrp, $CP_State, $CP_Country, $CP_GstNo, $CP_Pincode, $CP_InvVale, $CP_CostCenter, $CP_Stockitem, $CP_SGroup, $CP_SGrpofGrp, $CP_SCategory, $CP_SCatgofCat, $CP_UOM, $CP_BILLEDQTY, $CP_Rate, $CP_AMOUNT from CP_VoucherDataColl</SQLREQUEST>
			<STATICVARIABLES>
				<SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
			</STATICVARIABLES>
		</DESC>
	</BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
	<HEADER>
		<VERSION>1</VERSION>
		<TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
		<TYPE>Data</TYPE>
		<ID>ODBC Report</ID>
	</HEADER>
	<BODY>
		<DESC>
			<TDL>
				<TDLMESSAGE>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP_Ledgers DrsColl" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<TYPE>LEDGER</TYPE>
						<CHILDOF>$$GroupSundryDebtors</CHILDOF>
						<BELONGSTO>Yes</BELONGSTO>
						<NATIVEMETHOD>NAME, INCOMETAXNUMBER, PARTYGSTIN, LEDGSTREGDETAILS.*</NATIVEMETHOD>
					</COLLECTION>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP_Ledgers CrsColl" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<TYPE>LEDGER</TYPE>
						<CHILDOF>$$GroupSundryCreditors</CHILDOF>
						<BELONGSTO>Yes</BELONGSTO>
						<NATIVEMETHOD>NAME, INCOMETAXNUMBER, PARTYGSTIN, LEDGSTREGDETAILS.*</NATIVEMETHOD>
					</COLLECTION>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP_Ledgers SusColl" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<TYPE>LEDGER</TYPE>
						<CHILDOF>$$GroupSuspense</CHILDOF>
						<BELONGSTO>Yes</BELONGSTO>
						<NATIVEMETHOD>NAME, INCOMETAXNUMBER, PARTYGSTIN, LEDGSTREGDETAILS.*</NATIVEMETHOD>
					</COLLECTION>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP_Ledgers BranchColl" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<TYPE>LEDGER</TYPE>
						<CHILDOF>$$GroupBranches</CHILDOF>
						<BELONGSTO>Yes</BELONGSTO>
						<NATIVEMETHOD>NAME, INCOMETAXNUMBER, PARTYGSTIN, LEDGSTREGDETAILS.*</NATIVEMETHOD>
					</COLLECTION>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP_Ledgers" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<COLLECTIONS>CP_Ledgers DrsColl, CP_Ledgers CrsColl</COLLECTIONS>
						<COLLECTIONS>CP_Ledgers SusColl, CP_Ledgers BranchColl</COLLECTIONS>
					</COLLECTION>
					<SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="CP_tallyRel3_0" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINTERNAL="No">(@@LatestRelasStr Starting With "TallyPrime" OR @@LatestRelasStr Starting With "Tally Prime") AND $$Number:$$ProdInfo:ProdReleaseAsStr >= $$Number:3   </SYSTEM>
					<SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="CP_GSTINNO" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINTERNAL="No">IF @@CP_tallyRel3_0 THEN $LEDGSTREGDETAILS[-1].GSTIN ELSE $PARTYGSTIN   </SYSTEM>
					<SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="CP_isNameChck" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINTERNAL="No">$NAME = ""   </SYSTEM>
					<SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="CP_isPanChck" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINTERNAL="No">$INCOMETAXNUMBER = ""   </SYSTEM>
					<SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="CP_isGstinChck" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINTERNAL="No">@@CP_GSTINNO = ""   </SYSTEM>
				</TDLMESSAGE>
			</TDL>
			<SQLREQUEST TYPE="Prepare" METHOD="SQLPrepare">SELECT $$Numitems:CP_Ledgers AS COUNT from Company</SQLREQUEST>
			<STATICVARIABLES>
				<EXPLODEFLAG>Yes</EXPLODEFLAG>
				<SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
				<SVCURRENTCOMPANY>${escapedCompany}</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
			</STATICVARIABLES>
		</DESC>
	</BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
    <HEADER>
        <VERSION>1</VERSION>
        <TALLYREQUEST>IMPORT</TALLYREQUEST>
        <TYPE>DATA</TYPE>
        <ID>Vouchers</ID>
    </HEADER>
    <BODY>
        <DESC>
            <STATICVARIABLES>
                <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>Delhi - Lucid</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
            </STATICVARIABLES>
        </DESC>
    </BODY>
    <TALLYMESSAGE>     
<LEDGER>
	<LANGUAGENAME.LIST>
		<NAME.LIST TYPE="String">
			<NAME>Customer X1</NAME>
		</NAME.LIST>
		<LANGUAGEID> 1033</LANGUAGEID>
	</LANGUAGENAME.LIST>
	<PARENT>Suspense A/c</PARENT>
	<ISBILLWISEON>Yes</ISBILLWISEON>
    <DESCRIPTION>coowner@itc.com</DESCRIPTION>
	<MAILINGNAME>Customer X</MAILINGNAME>
	<ADDRESS.LIST TYPE="String">
		<ADDRESS>Address A</ADDRESS>
		<ADDRESS>Address B</ADDRESS>
		<ADDRESS>Address C</ADDRESS>
	</ADDRESS.LIST>
	<PINCODE>560070</PINCODE>
	<PRIORSTATENAME>Delhi</PRIORSTATENAME>
	<STATENAME>Delhi</STATENAME>
	<COUNTRYOFRESIDENCE>India</COUNTRYOFRESIDENCE>
	<LEDGERCONTACT>Contact Name</LEDGERCONTACT>
	<LEDGERPHONE>Phone No</LEDGERPHONE>
	<LEDGERMOBILE>Mobileno</LEDGERMOBILE>
	<EMAIL>email@itc.com</EMAIL>
	<EMAILCC>ccemail@itc.com</EMAILCC>
	<INCOMETAXNUMBER>PANNO</INCOMETAXNUMBER>
	<PARTYGSTIN>GSTNO</PARTYGSTIN>
	<PAYMENTDETAILS.LIST>
		<IFSCODE>HDFC001</IFSCODE>
		<BANKNAME>State Bank of India (India)</BANKNAME>
		<ACCOUNTNUMBER>1234567890-</ACCOUNTNUMBER>
		<PAYMENTFAVOURING>Customer X</PAYMENTFAVOURING>
		<TRANSACTIONNAME>Primary</TRANSACTIONNAME>
		<BANKID>1</BANKID>
		<SETASDEFAULT>No</SETASDEFAULT>
		<DEFAULTTRANSACTIONTYPE>Inter Bank Transfer</DEFAULTTRANSACTIONTYPE>
		<BENEFICIARYCODEDETAILS.LIST></BENEFICIARYCODEDETAILS.LIST>
	</PAYMENTDETAILS.LIST>
	<LEDGSTREGDETAILS.LIST>
		<APPLICABLEFROM>20240401</APPLICABLEFROM>
		<GSTREGISTRATIONTYPE>Regular</GSTREGISTRATIONTYPE>
		<PLACEOFSUPPLY>Delhi</PLACEOFSUPPLY>
		<GSTIN>GSTNO</GSTIN>
	</LEDGSTREGDETAILS.LIST>
	<LEDMAILINGDETAILS.LIST>
		<ADDRESS.LIST TYPE="String">
			<ADDRESS>Address A</ADDRESS>
			<ADDRESS>Address B</ADDRESS>
			<ADDRESS>Address C</ADDRESS>
		</ADDRESS.LIST>
		<APPLICABLEFROM>20240401</APPLICABLEFROM>
		<PINCODE>560070</PINCODE>
		<MAILINGNAME>Customer X</MAILINGNAME>
		<STATE>Delhi</STATE>
		<COUNTRY>India</COUNTRY>
	</LEDMAILINGDETAILS.LIST>
	<CONTACTDETAILS.LIST>
		<NAME>Contact Name</NAME>
		<PHONENUMBER>Mobileno</PHONENUMBER>
		<COUNTRYISDCODE>+91</COUNTRYISDCODE>
		<ISDEFAULTWHATSAPPNUM>Yes</ISDEFAULTWHATSAPPNUM>
	</CONTACTDETAILS.LIST>
</LEDGER>
 </TALLYMESSAGE>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
    <HEADER>
        <VERSION>1</VERSION>
        <TALLYREQUEST>EXPORT</TALLYREQUEST>
        <TYPE>DATA</TYPE>
        <ID>CP_Masters</ID>
    </HEADER>
    <BODY>
        <DESC>
            <STATICVARIABLES>
                <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>Data Lynk</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
            </STATICVARIABLES>
            <TDL>
                <TDLMESSAGE>
   <REPORT NAME="CP_Masters" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <Forms>CP_Masters</Forms>
   </REPORT>
   <FORM NAME="CP_Masters" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <TopParts>CP_PriceLevel, CP_TDSDeductType, CP_TDSNatofPay, CP_MSMEEntrType, CP_MSMEActvType, CP_Bank</TopParts>
    <TopParts>CP_Group</TopParts>
   </FORM>
   <PART NAME="CP_PriceLevel" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <TopLines>CP_PriceLevel</TopLines>
    <Repeat>CP_PriceLevel : Price Levels</Repeat>
    <Scrolled>Vertical</Scrolled>
    <XMLTag>"PRICELEVELLIST"</XMLTag>
   </PART>
   <PART NAME="CP_TDSDeductType" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <TopLines>CP_TDSDeductType</TopLines>
    <Repeat>CP_TDSDeductType : TDS DeducteeType</Repeat>
    <Scrolled>Vertical</Scrolled>
    <XMLTag>"TDSDEDUCTEETYPELIST"</XMLTag>
   </PART>
   <PART NAME="CP_TDSNatofPay" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <TopLines>CP_TDSNatofPay</TopLines>
    <Repeat>CP_TDSNatofPay : TDS RatesForLedMst</Repeat>
    <Scrolled>Vertical</Scrolled>
    <XMLTag>"NATUREOFPAYLIST"</XMLTag>
   </PART>
   <PART NAME="CP_MSMEEntrType" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <TopLines>CP_MSMEEntrType</TopLines>
    <Repeat>CP_MSMEEntrType : MSMERegEnterpriseType</Repeat>
    <Scrolled>Vertical</Scrolled>
    <XMLTag>"MSMEENTRPTYPELIST"</XMLTag>
   </PART>
   <PART NAME="CP_MSMEActvType" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <TopLines>CP_MSMEActvType</TopLines>
    <Repeat>CP_MSMEActvType : MSMERegActivityType</Repeat>
    <Scrolled>Vertical</Scrolled>
    <XMLTag>"MSMEACTVTYPELIST"</XMLTag>
   </PART>
   <PART NAME="CP_Bank" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <TopLines>CP_Bank</TopLines>
    <Repeat>CP_Bank : List of Banks</Repeat>
    <Scrolled>Vertical</Scrolled>
    <XMLTag>"BANKLIST"</XMLTag>
   </PART>
   <PART NAME="CP_Group" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <TopLines>CP_Group</TopLines>
    <Repeat>CP_Group : CP_Group Coll</Repeat>
    <Scrolled>Vertical</Scrolled>
    <XMLTag>"GROUPLIST"</XMLTag>
   </PART>
   <PART NAME="CP_GroupAddl" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <TopLines>CP_GroupAddl</TopLines>
    <Scrolled>Vertical</Scrolled>
    <XMLTag>"actions"</XMLTag>
   </PART>
   <LINE NAME="CP_PriceLevel" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <LeftFields>CP_Field1</LeftFields>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : Set as : $PriceLevel</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : XMLTag : "NAME"</Local>
    <XMLTag>"PRICELEVEL"</XMLTag>
   </LINE>
   <LINE NAME="CP_TDSDeductType" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <LeftFields>CP_Field1</LeftFields>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : Set as : $NAME</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : XMLTag : "NAME"</Local>
    <XMLTag>"TDSDEDUCTEETYPE"</XMLTag>
   </LINE>
   <LINE NAME="CP_TDSNatofPay" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <LeftFields>CP_Field1</LeftFields>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : Set as : $NAME</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : XMLTag : "NAME"</Local>
    <XMLTag>"NATUREOFPAY"</XMLTag>
   </LINE>
   <LINE NAME="CP_MSMEEntrType" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <LeftFields>CP_Field1</LeftFields>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : Set as : $NAME</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : XMLTag : "NAME"</Local>
    <XMLTag>"MSMEENTRPTYPE"</XMLTag>
    <Removeon>$$IsSysName:$NAME</Removeon>
   </LINE>
   <LINE NAME="CP_MSMEActvType" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <LeftFields>CP_Field1</LeftFields>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : Set as : $NAME</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : XMLTag : "NAME"</Local>
    <XMLTag>"MSMEACTVTYPE"</XMLTag>
    <Removeon>$$IsSysName:$NAME</Removeon>
   </LINE>
   <LINE NAME="CP_Bank" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <LeftFields>CP_Field1</LeftFields>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : Set as : $NAME</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : XMLTag : "NAME"</Local>
    <XMLTag>"BANK"</XMLTag>
   </LINE>
   <LINE NAME="CP_Group" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <LeftFields>CP_Field1</LeftFields>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : Set as : $NAME</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : XMLTag : "NAME"</Local>
    <XMLTag>"GROUP"</XMLTag>
    <Explode>CP_GroupAddl : Yes</Explode>
   </LINE>
   <LINE NAME="CP_GroupAddl" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <LeftFields>CP_Field1, CP_Field2, CP_Field3, CP_Field4, CP_Field5</LeftFields>
    <LeftFields>CP_Field6, CP_Field7, CP_Field8, CP_Field9, CP_Field10</LeftFields>
    <LeftFields>CP_Field11, CP_Field12, CP_Field13, CP_Field14</LeftFields>
    <Local>Field : Default : Type  : Logical</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : Set as : $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupBank OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupBankOD</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field2 : Set as : $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupBankOD</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field3 : Set as : $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupBank OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupBankOD OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupBranches OR  $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupCapital OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupCurrentAssets OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupCurrentLiab OR  $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryDebtors OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryCreditors</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field4 : Set as : $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupBranches OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupCapital OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupCurrentAssets OR  $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupCurrentLiab OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryDebtors OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryCreditors</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field5 : Set as : $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupBranches OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupCapital OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupCurrentAssets OR  $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupCurrentLiab OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryCreditors OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryDebtors</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field6 : Set as : $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupBranches OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupCapital OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryCreditors OR  $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryDebtors</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field7 : Set as : NOT $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupCash AND NOT $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupDirectExpenses AND NOT $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupIndirectExpenses AND NOT $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupDirectIncomes AND  NOT $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupIndirectIncomes AND NOT $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupStock</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field8 : Set as : $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupCurrentAssets OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupCurrentLiab OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupDirectExpenses OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupDirectIncomes OR  $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupFixedAssets OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupInDirectExpenses OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupInDirectIncomes OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupInvestments OR  $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupLoansLiab OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupMiscExp OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupProvisions OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupPurchase OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSales OR  $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSecuredLoans</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field9 : Set as : $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupDirectExpenses OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupDirectIncomes OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupFixedAssets OR  $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupInDirectExpenses OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupInDirectIncomes OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupPurchase OR  $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSales</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field10: Set as : $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryCreditors OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryDebtors</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field11: Set as : $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryCreditors OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryDebtors</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field12: Set as : $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryCreditors OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryDebtors</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field13: Set as : $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryCreditors OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSundryDebtors</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field14: Set as : $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupPurchase OR $$IsBelongsTo:$$GroupSales</Local>
    <Local>Field : CP_Field1 : XMLTag : "Has_CostCent"</Local>

   </LINE>

<ENVELOPE>
	<HEADER>
		<VERSION>1</VERSION>
		<TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
		<TYPE>Data</TYPE>
		<ID>ODBC Report</ID>
	</HEADER>
	<BODY>
		<DESC>
			<STATICVARIABLES>
				<EXPORTFLAG>YES</EXPORTFLAG>
				<SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
				<SVCURRENTCOMPANY>${escapedCompany}</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
			</STATICVARIABLES>
			<TDL>
				<TDLMESSAGE>
					<REPORT NAME="ODBC Report" ISMODIFY="Yes" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
						<Add>Variable : SVFromDate, SVToDate</Add>
						<Set>SVFromdate : "${tallyFromDate}"</Set>
						<Set>SVTodate : "${tallyToDate}"</Set>
					</REPORT>
					<COLLECTION NAME="CP BatchStock Coll" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <Type>Batches in Godown</Type>
    <ChildOf>$NAME</ChildOf>
    <NativeMethod>NAME, PARENT, CLOSINGBALANCE, CLOSINGVALUE</NativeMethod>
    <NativeMethod>MfdOn, ExpiryPeriod</NativeMethod>
    <Method>CPGODOWN : $$LoopCollObj:$Name</Method>
    <Filters>CP isSameStck</Filters>
   </COLLECTION>
   <COLLECTION NAME="CP GodownList" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <Type>GODOWN</Type>
    <NativeMethod>NAME</NativeMethod>
   </COLLECTION>
   <COLLECTION NAME="CP GodownStock Coll" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="No" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
    <Collections>CP BatchStock Coll : CP GodownList</Collections>
    <NativeMethod>NAME, PARENT, CLOSINGBALANCE, CLOSINGVALUE, CPGODOWN</NativeMethod>
    <NativeMethod>MfdOn, ExpiryPeriod</NativeMethod>
    <Sort>Default : $PARENT, $ITCGODOWN, $NAME</Sort>
   </COLLECTION>
   <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="CP isSameStck" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINTERNAL="No">$PARENT = $NAME:STOCKITEM:"HIHG5069"   </SYSTEM>

				</TDLMESSAGE>
			</TDL>
			<SQLREQUEST TYPE="Prepare" METHOD="SQLPrepare">Select $PARENT AS Stockitem, $CPGODOWN AS godown, $NAME AS Batchname, $MfdOn, $ExpiryPeriod, $$String:$ExpiryPeriod:UniversalDate AS ExpiryDate, $CLOSINGBALANCE, $CLOSINGVALUE * -1 AS CLOSINGVALUE from CPGodownStockColl</SQLREQUEST>
			<STATICVARIABLES>
				<SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
			</STATICVARIABLES>
		</DESC>
	</BODY>
</ENVELOPE>
